item.title: BenStarSports: AK BETS reposteó Ben Keith @BenStarSports · 18min Cita Star Sports Bookmakers @StarSports_Bet · 6h 14:53 | #Top10 ANTHO

AK BETS reposteó Ben Keith @BenStarSports · 18min Cita Star Sports Bookmakers @StarSports_Bet · 6h 14:53 | #Top10 ANTHONY KAMINSKAS
What do you think of punters now that you're a bookie?
What's a good bookmaker to you?
What is your favourite book?
Pro punter-turned-bookmaker @AKBets faces ten questions from @BenStarSports! 2 1 3 577

item.title:

item.description:
Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 22min | PERFORMANCE OF THE DAY
Frankel colt PORTCULLIS bolting up on debut at Newmarket under Ryan Moore for Team Gosden.
Looks a right good’un! De Racing TV 1 292
